name: Dr. Dabber Switch Sapphire Induction Cup
summary: Dabber Switc h Sapphire Induction Cup.
description: Dabber Switc h Sapphire Induction Cup. This premium insert enhances your Switch experience by providing a clean surface for enjoying full melt-tier materials and a superior terpene-tasting experience. Upgrade to the Sapphire Insert for exceptional heat retention and maximum effectiveness with your concentrates. Please note that the Switch must be in Crystal mode for use with the Sapphire Induction Cup. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
